# Frontend Detection Patterns

Consolidated from `frontend_inferencer`, `javascript_dom_analysis`, `html_content_analysis`.

## JavaScript Framework Globals

| Tech | Globals | DOM Attrs | Confidence |
|------|---------|-----------|------------|
| React | `window.React`, `__REACT_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__` | `data-reactroot`, `data-reactid` | 90 |
| Vue.js | `window.Vue`, `__VUE_DEVTOOLS_GLOBAL_HOOK__` | `data-v-*` (SFC scoped) | 90 |
| Angular | `window.ng`, `getAllAngularRootElements` | `ng-version` (extract version), `_ngcontent-*`, `_nghost-*` | 95 |
| AngularJS | (legacy) | `ng-app`, `ng-controller` | 90 |
| Svelte | `window.__svelte` | `data-svelte-h` | 90 |
| jQuery | `window.jQuery`, `window.$` | — | 85 |
| Alpine.js | `window.Alpine` | `x-data`, `x-init` | 90 |
| Backbone.js / Ember.js | `window.Backbone` / `window.Ember` | `data-ember-action` | 90 |
| Hotwire/Turbo | — | `data-turbo` | 90 |
| Stimulus | — | `data-stimulus-controller` | 90 |

## Meta-Frameworks (imply host framework)

| Tech | Globals / Bundle Patterns | Implies | Confidence |
|------|---------------------------|---------|------------|
| Next.js | `__NEXT_DATA__`, `__NEXT_LOADED_PAGES__`, `/_next/static/` | React, Node.js | 95 |
| Nuxt | `window.__NUXT__`, `$nuxt`, `/_nuxt/` | Vue.js, Node.js | 95 |
| Gatsby | `window.___gatsby`, `___emitter` | React | 95 |
| Remix | `__remixContext` | React | 95 |
| SvelteKit | `__sveltekit` | Svelte | 90 |
| Astro | `data-astro-*` | — | 85 |
| Create React App | `/static/js/main.<hash>.js` | React | 85 |

## Bundle / Path Patterns

| Path | Tech | Confidence |
|------|------|------------|
| `/_next/static/` | Next.js | 95 |
| `/_nuxt/` | Nuxt.js | 95 |
| `/wp-content/`, `/wp-includes/` | WordPress | 95 |
| `/sites/default/files/`, `/misc/drupal.js` | Drupal | 90 |
| `/assets/application-` | Ruby on Rails | 80 |
| `/bundles/`, `/Scripts/` | ASP.NET | 75 |
| `/bundle.js`, `/vendor.js`, `.chunk.js` | Webpack | 60-70 |
| `/@vite/`, `?v=<hash>` | Vite | 80 |

Version: extract from `__NEXT_DATA__.nextVersion`, `ng-version`, `window.React.version`, `window.Vue.version`.

## Meta Generator Tags

`<meta name="generator" content="...">` — extract regex `^([A-Za-z!]+)\s?([\d.]+)?`.

| Match | Tech | Version Extract |
|-------|------|-----------------|
| `WordPress 6.x` | WordPress | yes |
| `Drupal 10` | Drupal | yes |
| `Joomla!` | Joomla | yes |
| `Shopify`, `Wix.com`, `Squarespace`, `Webflow` | named platform | no |
| `Ghost`, `Hugo`, `Jekyll`, `Gatsby` | SSG | yes |

HTML comment fallback: `<!-- Powered by X -->`, `<!-- Generated by X -->`, `<!-- Built with X -->` (confidence 75-85).

## CSS Frameworks (class-pattern matching)

Match HTML class attributes against pattern lists. Min matches threshold gates detection.

| Framework | Class Patterns | Min Matches |
|-----------|----------------|-------------|
| Bootstrap | `btn btn-`, `container`, `navbar`, `row`, `col-`, `card`, `modal` | 3 |
| Tailwind CSS | `bg-`, `text-`, `flex`, `p-`, `m-`, `w-`, `h-`, `rounded-` | 5 |
| Foundation | `button`, `callout`, `top-bar`, `grid-x`, `cell` | 3 |
| Bulma | `button is-`, `columns`, `column`, `hero`, `box` | 3 |
| Material UI | `MuiButton`, `MuiGrid`, `MuiPaper`, `MuiTypography` | 2 |
| Chakra UI | `chakra-`, `css-` | 2 |
| Ant Design | `ant-btn`, `ant-card`, `ant-table`, `ant-form` | 2 |
| Radix UI / Headless UI | `data-radix-*` / `data-headlessui-*` | 1 |

## State Management & Build Tools

- Redux: `window.__REDUX_DEVTOOLS_EXTENSION__`
- MobX: `window.__mobxGlobal`
- Zustand / Recoil: bundle string match
- Webpack / Vite / Parcel / Rollup / esbuild: detect via bundle URL or chunk-naming convention

## Analytics & Tracking SDKs

Detect via JS globals AND/OR script src host:

| Service | Global | Script Host |
|---------|--------|-------------|
| Google Analytics | `gtag`, `ga`, `dataLayer`, `_gaq` | `google-analytics.com`, `googletagmanager.com` |
| Facebook Pixel | `fbq`, `_fbq` | `connect.facebook.net` |
| Mixpanel | `mixpanel` | `cdn.mxpnl.com` |
| Segment | `analytics` | `cdn.segment.com` |
| Amplitude | `amplitude` | `cdn.amplitude.com` |
| Heap | `heap` | `heap-analytics.com` |
| Hotjar | `hj`, `hjSiteSettings` | `static.hotjar.com` |
| FullStory | `FS`, `_fs_namespace` | `fullstory.com` |

## Source Map Exposure

For each `<script src=...>`:
- Check for trailing `.map` (e.g. `app.js.map`)
- Inspect for `//# sourceMappingURL=...` comment
- If accessible (HTTP 200) → flag as security finding (original source / file structure leaks)

## Structured Data

`<script type="application/ld+json">` → parse JSON, extract `@type`:
- `Product` → e-commerce
- `Organization` / `LocalBusiness` → business
- `Article` → blog/news
- `WebApplication` → web app

## Confidence Calculation

- High (80-100%): Direct framework global + supporting signal + version extracted
- Medium (50-79%): Bundle pattern match OR DOM attribute alone
- Low (20-49%): CSS class pattern only, single indirect signal, job-posting mention

## Tooling

```bash
# Headers + body
curl -sL --max-redirs 3 "$URL" -o page.html -D headers.txt

# Meta generator
grep -oP '<meta[^>]*name=["\x27]generator["\x27][^>]*content=["\x27][^"\x27]+' page.html

# Class extraction
grep -oP 'class=["\x27][^"\x27]+' page.html | sort -u

# Source map probe
curl -sI "$URL/static/js/main.js.map" | head -1
```

## Rate / Error

- Page fetches: 10/min/domain. Limit body to 5MB. Lenient HTML parser.
- JS analysis is local — no rate limit.
- Continue on parse errors; never execute fetched JS.
